analyses.experimental_strategy: Task Category to Copilot Assignment Correlation
key_insights: update-golang-org-x-vuln (security patch) got Copilot agent: SUCCESS in 13.07min
update-charmbracelet-golden (lib version bump): NO Copilot agent — pure gate-only automation
rename-actionpins-another-one (refactoring): Copilot in-progress at snapshot time
Hypothesis confirmed: security/functional tasks attract Copilot agents; pure version bumps do not
